relations.note: WCAG standard underpins the specific legibility/contrast requirements.
WCAG standard underpins form accessibility requirements.
WCAG standard underpins media accessibility requirements.

quotes: Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.
Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.

rules.intent: Ensure body text remains legible and accessible across all backgrounds and devices.
rules.rule_text: Body copy must be at least 16px (size.body.min_16 = 16px), bigger where possible, with line height at least 150% (line_height.body.min = 150%), increasing for light-on-dark text (line_height.light_on_dark.160 = 160%). Use a type scale to create visual hierarchy. Always test color contrast, never rely on color alone to convey meaning, and proofread all text for legibility.

quotes: Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels), click/tap targets **≥48px**.

rules.intent: Keep form interactions usable and accessible for all users.
rules.rule_text: Form labels must always remain visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels), and click/tap targets must be at least 48px (size.touch_target.min_height = 48px).

quotes: Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop.
animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.

rules.intent: Prevent motion from disrupting comprehension or causing accessibility issues, with an email-specific safeguard for limited rendering engines.
rules.rule_text: Animations must use quick, non-disruptive transitions, avoid excessive motion, and provide a way to pause effects; design motion for phone, tablet, and desktop. For email specifically, animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (since Outlook only renders the first frame), and no autoplaying motion may run longer than ~5s (email.motion.max_autoplay ≈ 5s) without a static fallback.

quotes: Media: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.

rules.intent: Ensure media content is accessible to users relying on assistive technology.
rules.rule_text: All images must carry descriptive alt text, and any video or audio content must have a transcript available.

rules.intent: Anchor all accessibility requirements to a recognized external standard.
rules.rule_text: WCAG (wcag.com) is the governing accessibility reference standard for all brand materials.
